record.field: Merit Scholarship
Awarded for outstanding academic excellence.
Minimum GPA of 3.8 or equivalent top academic standing.
Sports Scholarship
Awarded to students excelling in sports activities.
Participation and achievement in recognised sporting events.
Need-Based Grant
Financial assistance for students from low-income families.
Demonstrated financial need based on family income assessment.
Government Scholarship
Scholarship funded and administered by government bodies.
Eligibility as per respective government scholarship guidelines.
Research Scholarship
Supports students engaged in research projects.
Enrolled in a recognised research programme with faculty endorsement.
Arts Scholarship
Awarded to students demonstrating exceptional talent in the arts.
Portfolio submission and jury evaluation required.
Technology Scholarship
Supports students pursuing technology and STEM disciplines.
Enrolled in a technology-related programme with strong academic record.
Community Leadership Award
Recognises students who show outstanding community leadership.
Evidence of community service and leadership roles.
